visual_description: A man in a grey suit and turtleneck stands in a narrow alleyway at night, holding a water bottle in one hand and gesturing with the other. He is flanked by two other men, one on each side, in a tense interaction. The scene is dimly lit, with a glowing red sign visible in the background.
